Bug","color":"fef2c0","default":false,"description":null}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":1,"created_at":"2024-10-23T23:11:12Z","updated_at":"2024-10-23T23:56:50Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"draft":false,"pull_request":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/pulls/27631","html_url":"https://github.com/numpy/numpy/pull/27631","diff_url":"https://github.com/numpy/numpy/pull/27631.diff","patch_url":"https://github.com/numpy/numpy/pull/27631.patch","merged_at":null},"body":"BUG: Fix floats inaccuracies in numpy.lib.unwrap, raised in #27609

This is a different implementation for numpy.lib.unwrap.
Should be more resilient to float calculations inaccuracies.
Main reason is using arr.cumsum only for integral arrays.
Fixes outputs for long arrays with large floats, see #27609.

Closes #27609.","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27631/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27631/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/comments/2433808006","html_url":"https://github.com/numpy/numpy/pull/27631#issuecomment-2433808006","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27631","id":2433808006,"node_id":"IC_kwDOAA3dP86REPaG","user":{"login":"MunaAlaneme","id":84506748,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjg0NTA2NzQ4","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/84506748?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/MunaAlaneme","html_url":"https://github.com/MunaAlaneme","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MunaAlaneme/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MunaAlaneme/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MunaAlaneme/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MunaAlaneme/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MunaAlaneme/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MunaAlaneme/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MunaAlaneme/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MunaAlaneme/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MunaAlaneme/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-10-23T23:56:48Z","updated_at":"2024-10-23T23:56:48Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"BFDI (A)","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/comments/2433808006/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"performed_via_github_app":null}}
